name: torchani
desc: TorchANI 2.0 is an open-source library that supports training, development, and research of ANI-style neural network interatomic potentials. It was originally …
descFull: TorchANI 2.0 is an open-source library that supports training, development, and research of ANI-style neural network interatomic potentials. It was originally developed and is currently maintained by the Roitberg group.
